description: Phase 2 sub-phase 2.2: ship resolve-items-by-id (bulk variant) — library bulk-resolve wrapping buildIdIndex + pi tool + scripts/orchestrator/resolve-items-by-id.ts. Singular resolve-item-by-id tool already exists. No closure-table dependency.
